reelsScripts.hook: How I got a $200k job in 2 weeks
scenes: 0-3s: Text on screen — '50 job applications per day'
6-9s: Swiftdroom side panel — click Scan & Autofill
9-12s: Fields fill rapidly, counter shows '14 filled in 3 sec'
12-15s: CTA — '20% off code LAXJSLCA — link in bio'

reelsScripts.hook: POV: AI takes over your laptop
scenes: 0-4s: POV scrolling job board, clicking Apply
8-12s: Open Swiftdroom side panel, hit autofill
12-16s: Watch fields populate + ghostwriter answer appears
0-4s: Split screen — left: slow copy-paste, right: 3 sec autofill
